description: You are a Release Manager preparing for a code freeze. Identify emails in your inbox containing code contributions, characterized by 'PATCH' in the subject or diff content (lines starting with '+++', '---', 'Index:', or 'diff -u') in the body. Move at least 3 of these identified emails into a new folder named 'Patch-Review'. Draft an email to 'lead-dev@project.org' with the subject 'Patch Review Status' summarizing the total number of patches found in the inbox. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
